mapper.select: SELECT address_id, user_id, receiver_name, phone, province, city, district, detail_address, postal_code, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT address_id, user_id, receiver_name, phone, province, city, district, detail_address, postal_code, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM user_addresses WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_addresses ( user_id, receiver_name, phone, province, city, district, detail_address, postal_code, is_default ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{postalCode}, #{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, phone = #{phone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, is_default = #{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT}, update_time = NOW() WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
